No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Explicit topics '身體照護' (Health Care) and '疾病防治' (Disease Prevention), including '新冠肺炎病毒不斷突變' (COVID-19 virus constantly mutating), directly align with targets for combating diseases and managing health risks.
evidence: 新冠肺炎病毒不斷突變

Quality Education.reason: As a language course focused on discussing '時事' (current events) and '世界議題' (world issues), it directly supports Target 4.7 for education on sustainable development and global citizenship.

Gender Equality.reason: The inclusion of '人權議題' (human rights issues) provides an inferred link to gender equality, as it is a fundamental human right, though not an explicit focus.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water quality, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The discussion on '電動車真的比較環保嗎？' (Are electric cars really more environmentally friendly?) under '環境保護' (Environmental Protection) directly relates to clean energy technologies.
evidence: 電動車真的比較環保嗎？

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The topic '投資理財' (Investment and Financial Management) with '年輕人瘋存股' (young people are crazy about stock saving) has an inferred link to financial services and economic growth (Target 8.10).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Topics like '科技知識' (technological knowledge), '科技犯罪' (Cyber Crime), and '電動車' (electric cars) explicitly relate to innovation, technology adoption, and infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The explicit inclusion of '人權議題' (human rights issues) as a course topic directly supports targets for promoting inclusion and reducing inequalities (Target 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The topic '文化遺產' (cultural heritage) directly links to Target 11.4. Discussions on '電動車' also indirectly relate to reducing urban environmental impact (Target 11.6).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The '環境保護' (Environmental Protection) unit, particularly the '電動車' discussion, implicitly promotes awareness for sustainable lifestyles and resource use (Target 12.8).
evidence: 電動車真的比較環保嗎？

Climate Action.reason: The '環境保護' (Environmental Protection) unit and the discussion of '電動車' (electric cars) directly contribute to raising awareness on climate change mitigation strategies (Target 13.3).

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or combating desertification.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Explicit topics '科技犯罪' (Cyber Crime), including '假簡訊詐騙氾濫' (SMS scam proliferation), and '人權議題' (human rights issues) directly align with targets for combating crime and protecting fundamental freedoms.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's focus on discussing '放眼世界議題' (world issues) in Mandarin implicitly fosters global understanding and cross-cultural communication, a foundation for partnerships (Target 17.16).
